missions.title: Nháy LED
missions.goal: Nháy LED_1 ba lần bằng thingbot-telemetrix.
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix
from thingbot_telemetrix.private_constants import ThingBot

board = Telemetrix()

for _ in range(3):
    board.thingbot().control_led(ThingBot.LED_1, 100)
    time.sleep(0.5)
    board.thingbot().control_led(ThingBot.LED_1, 0)
    time.sleep(0.5)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')

missions.title: Di chuyển tiến
missions.goal: Cho robot tiến trong 1 giây rồi dừng.
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix
from thingbot_telemetrix.private_constants import ThingBot

board = Telemetrix()

board.thingbot().control_dc(ThingBot.MOTOR_1, 200)
time.sleep(1)
board.thingbot().control_dc(ThingBot.MOTOR_1, 0)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')

missions.title: Di chuyển lùi
missions.goal: Cho robot lùi trong 1 giây rồi dừng.
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix
from thingbot_telemetrix.private_constants import ThingBot

board = Telemetrix()

board.thingbot().control_dc(ThingBot.MOTOR_1, -200)
time.sleep(1)
board.thingbot().control_dc(ThingBot.MOTOR_1, 0)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')

missions.title: Quay Servo
missions.goal: Quay servo từ 0° đến 180° rồi về 0°.
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix
from thingbot_telemetrix.private_constants import ThingBot

board = Telemetrix()

for angle in range(0, 181, 10):
    board.thingbot().control_servo(ThingBot.SERVO_1, angle)
    time.sleep(0.05)

for angle in range(180, -1, -10):
    board.thingbot().control_servo(ThingBot.SERVO_1, angle)
    time.sleep(0.05)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')

missions.title: Kêu Còi
missions.goal: Phát âm thanh ba lần bằng còi.
missions.api_hint:
board.thingbot().control_buzzer(440)  # bật tần số 440 Hz
board.thingbot().control_buzzer(0)    # tắt
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix

board = Telemetrix()

for _ in range(3):
    board.thingbot().control_buzzer(440)
    time.sleep(0.3)
    board.thingbot().control_buzzer(0)
    time.sleep(0.2)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')

missions.title: Phản hồi nút nhấn
missions.goal: In ra màn hình khi nhấn và thả nút trong 5 giây.
missions.api_hint:
board.thingbot().set_sw_callback(fn)  # fn(state: bool)
# state=True: nhấn, state=False: thả
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix

board = Telemetrix()

def on_switch(state):
    if state:
        print('Nhấn!')
    else:
        print('Thả!')

board.thingbot().set_sw_callback(on_switch)
time.sleep(5)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')

missions.title: Nút điều khiển LED
missions.goal: Bật LED khi nhấn nút, tắt LED khi thả nút.
missions.api_hint: Dùng callback để bật/tắt LED theo trạng thái nút nhấn.
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix
from thingbot_telemetrix.private_constants import ThingBot

board = Telemetrix()

def on_switch(state):
    brightness = 100 if state else 0
    board.thingbot().control_led(ThingBot.LED_1, brightness)

board.thingbot().set_sw_callback(on_switch)
time.sleep(10)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')

missions.title: Nháy đèn GPIO
missions.goal: Nháy đèn trên chân GPIO số 7 ba lần.
missions.starter_code:
import time
from thingbot_telemetrix import Telemetrix

board = Telemetrix()
board.gpio().set_pin_mode_output(7)

for _ in range(3):
    board.gpio().digital_write(7, 1)
    time.sleep(0.5)
    board.gpio().digital_write(7, 0)
    time.sleep(0.5)

board.shutdown()
print('Xong!')
